mapper.select: SELECT CASE WHEN SOLD_OUT = 'Y' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS soldOut FROM MENU WHERE MENU_NO = #{menuNo}

SELECT ors.ORDER_NO ,res.REST_NAME ,me.MENU_NAME ,ors.QUANTITY ,ors.STATUS ,me.PRICE ,res.DELIVERY_FEE FROM DELI_MEMBER deli LEFT OUTER JOIN ORDERS ors ON deli.MEMBER_NO = ors.MEMBER_NO LEFT OUTER JOIN MENU me ON ors.MENU_NO = me.MENU_NO LEFT OUTER JOIN RESTAURANT res ON me.REST_NO = res.REST_NO WHERE deli.MEMBER_NO = #{memberNo} ORDER BY ors.ORDER_NO DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE ORDERS SET STATUS = '주문취소' WHERE ORDER_NO = #{orderNo} AND STATUS = '주문접수'
